narrative: Iran halting nuclear talks and cutting oil supply drives a geopolitical risk premium — USD/JPY firms to 159.70 as 300bp Fed-BoJ carry offsets risk-premium flows; gold higher +0.44% near $4,526; equities +0.26%; DXY -0.01%; VIX 16.1. RBNZ hike bets for July intensify following a hawkish 3:3 split vote, though a -0.83% real rate maintains NZD's accommodative profile. USD/CHF IV at 18.0% vs HV30 6.3% shows a massive 11.7pt VRP as markets pay for protection. Watch BoC Rate Decision June 10.
